title: Anthropic Tool Use
description: Schema for Anthropic Claude tool use definitions, tool choice configuration, tool use content blocks, and tool result content blocks used within the Messages API.

ToolDefinition.description: A custom tool definition provided in the tools array of a Messages API request. Specifies the name, description, and input schema for a tool Claude may invoke.

type.description: The type of tool. Defaults to 'custom' for user-defined tools.

name.description: Name of the tool. Must match ^[a-zA-Z0-9_-]{1,64}$.

description.description: Detailed description of what this tool does. Tool descriptions should be as detailed as possible to help the model understand when and how to use the tool.

ToolInputSchema.description: A JSON Schema object defining the expected parameters for a tool. Must be of type 'object'.

properties.description: An object where each key is a parameter name and the value is a JSON Schema describing that parameter.

required.description: An array of parameter names that are required.

ToolParameterSchema.description: JSON Schema for an individual tool parameter.

type.description: The JSON Schema type of the parameter.

description.description: A description of the parameter to help Claude understand its purpose.

enum.description: An array of allowed values for this parameter.

items.description: Schema for array items when type is 'array'.

required.description: Required nested properties when type is 'object'.

default.description: The default value for this parameter.

ServerToolDefinition.description: An Anthropic-defined server tool that executes on Anthropic's servers. Server tools include web search, web fetch, code execution, bash, text editor, and memory.

type.description: The versioned server tool type identifier.

ToolChoice.description: Specifies how the model should use the provided tools.

type.description: The type of tool choice: 'auto' lets Claude decide, 'any' forces a tool call, 'tool' forces a specific tool, 'none' prevents tool use.

name.description: The name of the tool to force. Required and only valid when type is 'tool'.

disable_parallel_tool_use.description: Whether to disable parallel tool use. When true, the model will only call one tool at a time.

ToolUseContentBlock.description: A tool use content block in an API response, indicating that Claude wants to call a tool. Appears in the content array of an assistant message when stop_reason is 'tool_use'.

id.description: A unique identifier for this tool use request. Must be provided in the corresponding tool_result block.

name.description: The name of the tool the model wants to call.

input.description: An object containing the tool input generated by the model, conforming to the tool's input_schema.

ToolResultContentBlock.description: A tool result content block sent in a user message to provide the output of a tool execution back to Claude.

tool_use_id.description: The id of the tool_use content block that this result corresponds to.

content.description: The result of the tool call. Can be a string or an array of text content blocks.

is_error.description: Set to true if the tool execution resulted in an error. Claude will use this to understand that something went wrong.

CacheControl.description: Cache control configuration for prompt caching.

ToolUseExample.description: A complete example of a tool use request showing tool definition, message, and expected response patterns.
